ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the game */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the game */,
  "lead_developer" TEXT /* Lead developer of the game */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the game */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stim_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the stimulus */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the stimulus was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the stimulus was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain (e.g., structures, characters) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domain */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the domain was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the domain was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subdomains" (
  "subdomain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subdomain */,
  "subdomain_name" TEXT /* Name of the subdomain (e.g., bridge, house) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subdomain */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain the subdomain belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the subdomain was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the subdomain was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subdomain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subdomains_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game the level belongs to */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the level */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the level was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the level was last modified */,
  "lead_designer" TEXT /* Lead designer of the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_levels_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzles" (
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each puzzle */,
  "puzzle_name" TEXT /* Name of the puzzle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the puzzle */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level the puzzle belongs to */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty of the puzzle */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the puzzle was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the puzzle was last modified */,
  "lead_designer" TEXT /* Lead designer of the puzzle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("puzzle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzles_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle interacted with */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_interactions_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dsls" (
  "dsl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DSL */,
  "dsl_name" TEXT /* Name of the DSL (e.g., dsl_0_base) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DSL */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the DSL was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the DSL was last modified */,
  "lead_developer" TEXT /* Lead developer of the DSL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dsl_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "dsl_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DSL the program belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the program */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the program was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the program was last modified */,
  "lead_developer" TEXT /* Lead developer of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_dsl_id FOREIGN KEY ("dsl_id") REFERENCES dsls ("dsl_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_lengths" (
  "program_length_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program length */,
  "program_length" INTEGER /* Length of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program length */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the length belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the program length was recorded */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the program length was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_length_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_lengths_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "what_word_sums" (
  "what_word_sum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each what word sum */,
  "what_word_sum" INTEGER /* Sum of the what words */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the what word sum */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the sum belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the what word sum was recorded */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the what word sum was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("what_word_sum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_what_word_sums_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "where_word_sums" (
  "where_word_sum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each where word sum */,
  "where_word_sum" INTEGER /* Sum of the where words */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the where word sum */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the sum belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the where word sum was recorded */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the where word sum was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("where_word_sum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_where_word_sums_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, designer, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
